retrieved_result: How Much Does a Clock Spring Replacement Cost? Transportation Costs > Vehicle Repair and Maintenance > How Much Does a Clock Spring Replacement Cost? How Much Does a Clock Spring Replacement Cost? The clock spring connects to a vehicle’s steering wheel, allowing it to turn while still running the other electronic components. This device is found
